base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of zombie_rise_walk — a character from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Zombie — 3-frame: rise-from-ground / upright / walk. Night spawn in most towns' surroundings. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Zombie — 3-frame: rise-from-ground / upright / walk. Night spawn in most towns' surroundings

nudges.delta: walk. Night spawn in most towns' surroundings
